{{< include _setup_analyzed.qmd >}}

```{python}
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Setup: attach the comparisons"
#| output: false
from primes_in_intervals import compare

for _ds in (retrieve_data1disj, retrieve_data1olap,
            retrieve_data2disj, retrieve_data2olap,
            nest_data1disj, nest_data1olap,
            nest_data2disj, nest_data2olap):
    compare(_ds)
```
